  "perspective": "Risk Manager",
  "summary": "Avis Tax Professionals (lowest IRS rejection rate), Global Tax Advisors (CIS expertise), TaxPreparer.com (fastest processing). All under $400, remote verification, active BBB/Trustpilot profiles.",

  "proposed_action": "Prioritize Avis for reliability, Global for CIS compliance, TaxPreparer for speed. Flag all for data retention policies.",
  "whistleblower_flag": null
}
